headline: CrowdStrike AI Security Upgrades And Microsoft Tie Up Draw Investor Focus
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings (NasdaqGS:CRWD) has rolled out extensive AI security upgrades to its Falcon platform, focusing on AI agent protection across desktop, cloud, SaaS, and browser environments. The company has incorporated capabilities from its Seraphic acquisition to strengthen browser runtime security for AI workloads. CrowdStrike also announced integration of Falcon Next-Gen SIEM with Microsoft Defender for Endpoint, aiming to simplify security operations for Microsoft customers without...

headline: Beat the S&P 500 Without the Magnificent 7 Risk
summary: For decades, plain-vanilla index investing was the easiest way to build wealth without losing sleep. The S&P 500 had delivered roughly 10% average annual returns over the long haul, so simply buying a low-cost fund that tracked the index let investors capture those gains without the headache of picking individual stocks. Unfortunately, the Magnificent 7 ... Beat the S&P 500 Without the Magnificent 7 Risk

headline: OKX Rolls Out Round the Clock Trading for Mag Seven Stocks Using Crypto Collateral
summary: The derivatives give users synthetic exposure to major U.S. equities while using Bitcoin and other crypto holdings as collateral, with plans to expand into tokenized assets later this year.

content.summary: The derivatives give users synthetic exposure to major U.S. equities while using Bitcoin and other crypto holdings as collateral, with plans to expand into tokenized assets later this year.

headline: What Investors Said About Monday’s Big Market Shifts
summary: A little after 7 a.m. ET Monday, President Trump posted that the U.S. military would postpone strikes on Iranian power plants. An immediate and stark market reversal followed, with stocks rising and crude oil falling sharply.

content.title: What Investors Said About Monday’s Big Market Shifts
content.summary: A little after 7 a.m. ET Monday, President Trump posted that the U.S. military would postpone strikes on Iranian power plants. An immediate and stark market reversal followed, with stocks rising and crude oil falling sharply.

headline: Technology Dashboard 2025: U.S. remains leading country of origin for European patent applications as China makes gains
summary: Companies and inventors from around the world filed a record 201 974 patent applications last year at the European Patent Office (EPO), according to the EPO Technology Dashboard 2025 (formerly Patent Index) published today. The U.S. maintained its position as the top country of origin for European patent applications, followed by Germany, China, Japan and Republic of Korea, with China rising to third place after a strong increase (+9.7%) in filings. American innovators filed 47,008 applications,

headline: Nudge Security extends its AI security leadership with AI agent discovery
summary: Nudge Security, the leader in SaaS and AI security governance, today announced new AI agent discovery capabilities that give security teams the ability to find, assess, and govern AI agents as employees deploy them. With it, Nudge Security now offers the industry's most comprehensive AI security and governance solution.

content.title: Nudge Security extends its AI security leadership with AI agent discovery
content.summary: Nudge Security, the leader in SaaS and AI security governance, today announced new AI agent discovery capabilities that give security teams the ability to find, assess, and govern AI agents as employees deploy them. With it, Nudge Security now offers the industry's most comprehensive AI security and governance solution.

thumbnail.caption: AI Agent Discovery in action: discover shadow AI agents, owners, permissions, data access, and risk signals in one place. With Nudge Security, security teams can govern AI agents across the enterprise.

headline: Striveworks Secures Growth Capital to Expand AI Operations Work in U.S. and Allied Defense Communities
summary: Striveworks, a leader in AI operations for defense and national security missions, today announced a strategic growth investment led by Washington Harbour Partners. Striveworks is a proven U.S. government partner whose platform is deployed across numerous agencies and divisions—including the Army's $100 million flagship AI initiative alongside Anduril, Palantir, and Microsoft. headline: Rubrik announces new integration with Microsoft Defender at RSAC 2026
summary: Rubrik (RBRK) announced a new integration with Microsoft (MSFT) Defender at RSAC 2026. headline: Microsoft Security Integrations Deepen AI Role While Valuation Draws Investor Focus
summary: Microsoft is expanding its security ecosystem with new integrations across Microsoft Security Copilot and the Sentinel data lake. Partners including Commvault, Rubrik, and XBOW are tying their platforms into Microsoft tools to connect threat detection, automated remediation, and recovery. The new capabilities span AI driven cyber resilience, identity protection, autonomous offensive security, and trusted recovery workflows. headline: Shamrock Technologies extends collaboration with Alithya for next phase of global ERP modernization and AI innovation
summary: Alithya (TSX: ALYA) is pleased to announce the expansion of its collaboration with Shamrock Technologies, a global leader in specialty additives manufacturing. Following the successful deployment of Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance & Supply Chain Management within the company's U.S. operations, Alithya will now lead the implementation at the company's European headquarters in Belgium.
